title: TransactionService NPE on null input
description: Bug report: TransactionService.process(null) throws a NullPointerException at line 42 of TransactionService.java when the input is null. Steps to reproduce: call process(null). Expected behavior: the method should either return a meaningful error response or throw a documented exception, not an NPE. This is causing test_TransactionService_nullInput to fail. Details in test_failure.log and bug_report.md.

title: Spike: add @NonNull annotations across TransactionService
description: Old research spike exploring bean-validation annotations for TransactionService. Superseded by tracking issue TASK-2105; retained only for historical reference.

title: Add regression test for TransactionService null handling
description: Follow-up task to add a regression test once the null-input fix lands.
